General.Name: Richly Field China Development Ltd
General.Description: Richly Field China Development Limited, an investment holding company, engages in outlets commercial operation and development business in the People's Republic of China. The company develops and operates commercial properties, including tourism and senior care properties, and wine chateaus; and develops and manages residential properties, as well as property management. It is also involved in the home furnishing business. The company was formerly known as Dickson Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to Richly Field China Development Limited in March 2009. Richly Field China Development Limited was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Clifford Centre, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong
